Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s  14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

beIN SPORTS 7.desc_ar: Played at Indian Wells Tennis Garden, this ATP Masters 1000 features one of the slowest hard courts on tour, with a high bounce that neutralizes power and rewards heavy topspin and patience. beIN SPORTS 1.desc_ar: Newcastle United have faced Barcelona five times before in Europe, each coming in the UEFA Champions League. The Magpies’ only victory came in the first clash, 3-2 at home in the Group Stages in September 1997, with Barca winning each of the following four games. Barcelona have faced English opposition 33 times in the knockout stages of the UEFA Champions League, winning 10 of their last 12 matches since 2014.

beIN SPORTS 1.desc_ar: Manchester City will face Real Madrid for the 16th time in the UEFA Champions League, twice as often as they have faced any other team in the competition. This will be the first time two teams have met in the knockout phase of the competition in five consecutive seasons. Only Bayern Munich  and Juventus  have won more UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid than Manchester City, who beat them 2-1 in this season's league phase.

beIN SPORTS 3.desc_ar: This will be Atalanta’s 14 match against German opposition across major European competition, losing just three of those matches overall  and winning four of their last five since the start of 2024. Bayern Munich and Atalanta have never faced before in European competition. The Germans lost their last knockout stage tie against Italian opposition in the UEFA Champions League, after having progressed from each of their previous four knockout ties against Serie A sides in the competition.

Desert wind conditions and a 96-player draw make it a true endurance test over two weeks, often favoring strong returners and baseline grinders.

beIN SPORTS EN 2.desc_ar: ONE Championship returns on March 13, live from Bangkok’s Lumpinee Stadium in U.S. primetime. In the main event, lightweight Muay Thai contenders Sinsamut Klinmee and George Jarvis meet in a key bout with World Title implications. In the co-main event, Tye Ruotolo defends the ONE Welterweight Submission Grappling World Title against Pawel Jaworski. The card also features John Lineker, Supergirl, and Hyu Iwata.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_fr: Galatasaray vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Huitièmes de finale - Aller
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: Galatasaray have only lost one of their last nine home games against English clubs in all European competition, going down 1-4 to Arsenal in December 2014. They have already beaten Liverpool 1-0 at home in this season's competition. Liverpool have won just one of five previous UEFA Champions League meetings with Galatasaray, a win rate of 20% - their joint-lowest against any side they have faced 5+ times in the competition.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: This will be Atalanta’s 14 match against German opposition across major European competition, losing just three of those matches overall  and winning four of their last five since the start of 2024. Bayern Munich and Atalanta have never faced before in European competition. The Germans lost their last knockout stage tie against Italian opposition in the UEFA Champions League, after having progressed from each of their previous four knockout ties against Serie A sides in the competition.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_fr: Newcastle United vs Barcelone - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Huitièmes de finale - Aller
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: Newcastle United have faced Barcelona five times before in Europe, each coming in the UEFA Champions League. The Magpies’ only victory came in the first clash, 3-2 at home in the Group Stages in September 1997, with Barca winning each of the following four games. Barcelona have faced English opposition 33 times in the knockout stages of the UEFA Champions League, winning 10 of their last 12 matches since 2014.
